title: Tighten recipe selection
summary: Keep selector rules deterministic as more section recipes compose together.
nextStep: Add a regression config whenever selector behavior changes.

title: Local-first user overrides
summary: Let visitors locally move roadmap cards without implying shared task updates.
nextStep: Use localStorage for browser-only status overrides and keep durable changes in JSON.

title: Static intelligence index
summary: Generate precomputed indexes that make static sites feel more queryable.
nextStep: Prototype a JSON index from recipe, artifact, and roadmap metadata.

title: Autonomous maintenance cadence
summary: Define when recurring agents may propose changes without adding notification noise.
nextStep: Approve a quiet schedule and escalation boundaries before automation.

title: Static deploy evidence follow-up
summary: GitHub Pages publishes the built output and npm run verify:deploy checks the live URL after deployment.
nextStep: Keep this proof item linked to a real repo artifact before strengthening copy.

title: Agent contracts follow-up
summary: .agent/site.contract.yaml and .agent/brand.contract.yaml define the mission, allowed claims, forbidden claims, visual posture, and approval boundaries.
nextStep: Keep this proof item linked to a real repo artifact before strengthening copy.
